sourceDesc.p: Derived from CDSL MW, PWG, PWK, AP90, GRA, and FRI source records for interoperability analysis.

projectDesc.p: tei-archival-profile-v0.1; TEI is used as the archival/textual model. Raw CDSL records are preserved as escaped source-entry quotes, while selected lexical structures are promoted into TEI entry, form, sense, citation, and relation elements.

revisionDesc.change: Included in the full machine-reviewed TEI profile.

sense.note: No stable machine definition could be extracted; source record is preserved in cit/quote.

listBibl.head: Machine-extracted citation index; source quotes preserve the archival text.

{#sA tezAM pAvanAya syAt#} <ls>Ms. 11. 86</ls>; <lbinfo n="a#nyErnfpAlEH"/> {#anyErnfpAlEH paridIyamAnaM SAkAya vA#} <lbinfo n="syAllava#RAya"/> {#syAllavaRAya vA syAt#} <ls>Jagannātha</ls>. {@--9@} To stay, reside, dwell, live; {#hA pitaH#} <lbinfo n="kvA#si"/> {#kvAsi he suBru#} <ls>Bk. 6. 11.</ls> {@--10@} To take place, happen. {@--11@} To be in a <lbinfo n="par+ticular"/> particular relation, to be affected (with <ab>loc.</ab>); {#kiMnu Kalu yaTA#} <lbinfo n="vayamasyAmevamiyama#pyasmAt"/> {#vayamasyAmevamiyamapyasmAt prati syAt#} <ls>Ś. 1.</ls> {#astu#} well, let it be; {#evamastu, taTAstu#} so be it, amen. The form {#Asa#} joined to roots in forming their periphrastic perfect is sometimes separated from the root and used by itself; {#taM pAtayAM#} {#praTamamAsa papAta paScAt#} <ls>R. 9. 61</ls>, <ls n="R.">16. 86.</ls> [Cf. <ab>L.</ab> {%est%} and <ab>Gr.</ab> {%esti%} with {#asti#}; {%esse%}; Zend. {%āsti%}; Pers. {%hast%}, {%ast%}]. --WITH {#ati#} to be over, excel, surpass. {#--anu#} to be at hand, reach. {#--api#} (with <ab>loc.</ab> or an <ab>adv.</ab> of place) {1} to be in anything. {2} to belong to, be closely connected with. {#--aBi#} {1} to belong to, to fall to one's share; {#yanmamABizyAt#} <ls>Sk.</ls> {2} to be over. {3} to excel, surpass. {4} to [Page0208-b+ 58] domineer or to tyrannize over, rule over. {#--Avis#} to arise, spring up, be visible; {#AcAryakaM vijayi#} <lbinfo n="mAnmaTamAvi#rAsIt"/> {#mAnmaTamAvirAsIt#} <ls>Māl. 1. 26.</ls> {#--upa#} to be near to or in. {#--pari#} {1} to be in the way. {2} to surpass. {3} to pass or spend (time). {4} to pervade. {#--pra#} {1} to be in front of. {2} to be in an extraordinary degree, to preponderate, excel, <lbinfo n="sur+pass"/> surpass. {#--prati#} {1} to be equal to, be a match for. {2} to rival, emulate, vie with. {3} to be a representative of, stand in place of. {#--prAdus#} to appear, spring up; {#prAdurAsIttamonudaH#} <ls>Ms. 1. 6</ls>; <ls>R. 11. 15.</ls> {#--vyati#} (<ab>Atm.</ab> {#vyatihe#}, <lbinfo n="vya#tise"/> {#vyatise; vyatiste#}) to excel, surpass, be above or superior to, out-weigh; {#anyo vyatiste tu mamApi DarmaH#} <ls>Bk. 2. 35.</ls> {vII.v} {c4c} <ab>P.</ab> ({#asyati, Asa, AsTat#}, <lbinfo n="a#situM"/> {#asituM, asta#}) {@1@} To throw, cast, hurl, discharge, shoot (with <ab>loc.</ab> of the mark); {#tasminnAsTadizIkAstraM#} <lbinfo n="ls:R. 12.+ 23"/> <ls>R. 12. 23</ls>; <ls>Bk. 15. 91</ls>, <ls n="Bk.">14. 77</ls>; sometimes with <ab>dat.</ab> or <ab>gen.</ab>; {#dasyave hetimasya#} <lbinfo n="ls:Rv.+ 1. 103. 3."/> <ls>Rv. 1. 103. 3.</ls> {@--2@} To drive away, <lbinfo n="re+move"/> remove. {@--3@} To frighten or scare away. {@--4@} To throw or take away, let go, leave, give up; as in {#astamAna#}, <lbinfo n="asta#Soka"/> {#astaSoka, astakopa#}; see {#asta#}. --WITH {#ati#} to shoot beyond or at, overpower (with arrows); {#atyasta#} having shot beyond, having surpassed or <lbinfo n="excel+led"/> excelled; joined in <ab>acc.</ab> <ab>Tat.</ab> <ab>comp.</ab>; <lbinfo n="ls:P. II.+1"/> <ls>P. II. 1. 24</ls>. {#--aBipra#} to throw over or <lbinfo n="up+on"/> upon, hurl at. {#--parini#} to stretch. {vIII.v} {c1c} <ab>U.</ab> ({#asati-te, asita#}). {@1@} To go. {@--2@} To take or receive, seize. {@--3@} To shine (The examples usually <lbinfo n="cit+ed"/> cited to illustrate this sense are <lbinfo n="nizpra#BaSca"/> {#nizpraBaSca praBurAsa BUBftAM#} <ls>R. 11. 81</ls>; {#tenAsa lokaH#} {#pitfmAn vinetrA#} <ls n="R.">14. 23</ls>; {#lAvaRya utpAdya#} {#ivAsa yatnaH#} <ls>Ku. 1. 35.</ls> But the sense of {#didIpe#} or ‘shone’ is far-fetched, though Vāmana is disposed to take it. It seems preferable to regard {#Asa#} in these instances as equivalent to {#baBUva#}, either taking it, as Śākaṭāyana does, as an indeclinable <lbinfo n="tiNaMtapratirUpaka#mavyayaM"/> {#tiNaMtapratirUpakamavyayaM#}, or considering it, as Vallabha does, as an ungrammatical form used against the rules of grammar, <lbinfo n="prAmA#dikaH"/> {#prAmAdikaH prayogaH#}; see <ls>Malli.</ls> on <ls>Ku. 1. 35</ls>). <LEND>

<L>758<pc>038<k1>as<k2>as I √as asti <div n="1"/>1 <lang n="czech">býti, existovati, přiházeti se; pobývati, dlíti; býti po ruce, pomáhati; býti s to, stačiti; býti někoho, patřiti někomu; státi se</lang> <div n="1"/>2 <lang n="russian">быть, существовать, случаться; пребывать, находиться; быть под рукой, помогать; быть в состоянии, быть способным; принадлежать кому-нибудь; случиться</lang> <div n="1"/>3 <lang n="english">to be, exist, happen; stay, abide; be present, help; be equal to, be a match for; be of, belong; become, turn out</lang> <LEND>
